# BioLogica Pets

BioLogica is India's first sachet-based canine nutrition brand, founded to make premium, science-backed dog nutrition accessible and convenient.

## Products

- Omega Balance+: Marine-derived omega topper with Green-Lipped Mussel (GLM) for joint health, coat shine, and heart/brain function. 30 sachets. Vet recommended.

- Organ Balance+: Dehydrated organ-based topper for immunity, energy, and natural multivitamins. 30 sachets. Vet recommended.

- Gut Balance+: 100% vegetarian gut-friendly topper for nausea, stool consistency, and gut lining repair. 30 sachets. Vet recommended.

## What BioLogica solves

- Dogs with joint stiffness, dull coats, or low mobility

- Dogs with weak immunity, low energy, or inflammation

- Dogs with digestive issues, nausea, or inconsistent stools

- Dog parents seeking vet-recommended, daily-use nutrition toppers

## Brand facts

- Format: Single-serve sachets (mess-free, precise dosing, travel-friendly)

- Philosophy: Real food ingredients, no fillers, no synthetic additives

- Target: Dog parents across India who want premium nutrition without guesswork

## Contact

Website: https://biologicapets.com
